import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { DrawerService } from '../../services/drawer.service'; @Component({ selector: 'app-navbar', standalone: true, imports: [ ], templateUrl: './navbar.component.html', styleUrl: './navbar.component.scss' }) export class NavbarComponent { constructor(private drawerService: DrawerService) {} openMenu() { this.drawerService.toggle(); // or open() } }
